purpose: Declare the semantic boundary for evaluating red-before-green evidence for generated tests and generated implementation projections.
mustDo: verify green test receipt exists for implementation completion
verify red and green receipts reference the same generated test artifact hash or declared supersession
verify red execution occurred before implementation materialization
verify green execution occurred after implementation materialization
fail closed when evidence order or hashes do not match
mustNotDo: require changes to the resolver repository
completionPosture: Green completion is valid only when red-before-green evidence is ordered, hash-bound, and receipted.
